# Pull Request

## 📝 Description
Brief description of changes and the motivation behind them.

**Related Issue(s):** 
- Fixes #[issue number]
- Closes #[issue number]
- Related to #[issue number]

## 🔄 Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI changes
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Test additions or modifications
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI changes
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvements

## 🧪 Testing
**How has this been tested?**
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Cross-browser testing
- [ ] Mobile testing
- [ ] Accessibility testing

**Test Configuration:**
- Browser(s): [e.g. Chrome 118, Firefox 119, Safari 17]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 13.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Device(s): [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S23]

**Test Steps:**
1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

## 📸 Screenshots/Recordings
**Before:**
<!-- Add screenshots of the current state -->

**After:**
<!-- Add screenshots of the new state -->

**Demo:**
<!-- Add GIFs or video recordings if applicable -->

## 🔍 Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## 🎯 Functionality Checklist
- [ ] Feature works as expected
- [ ] Error handling is implemented
- [ ] Edge cases are considered
- [ ] Loading states are handled
- [ ] Empty states are handled
- [ ] User feedback is provided (success/error messages)

## 📱 Responsive Design Checklist
- [ ] Mobile (< 768px) ✅
- [ ] Tablet (768px - 1024px) ✅
- [ ] Desktop (> 1024px) ✅
- [ ] Touch interactions work properly
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works

## ♿ Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] Semantic HTML is used
- [ ] ARIA labels are added where necessary
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG 2.1 AA standards
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility tested
- [ ] Focus indicators are visible
- [ ] Alternative text for images

## 🚀 Performance Checklist
- [ ] No unnecessary re-renders
- [ ] Images are optimized
- [ ] Lazy loading implemented where appropriate
- [ ] Bundle size impact is minimal
- [ ] No memory leaks
- [ ] API calls are optimized

## 🔒 Security Checklist
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed in client-side code
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] XSS prevention measures in place
- [ ] CSRF protection considered
- [ ] Authentication/authorization properly handled

## 📊 Impact Assessment
**Performance Impact:**
- Bundle size change: [+/- X KB]
- Runtime performance: [Improved/No change/Degraded]
- Memory usage: [Improved/No change/Increased]

**Breaking Changes:**
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes (describe below)

**Migration Required:**
- [ ] No migration needed
- [ ] Migration guide provided

## 🔗 Dependencies
**New Dependencies Added:**
- [ ] No new dependencies
- [ ] New dependencies listed below:
  - `package-name@version` - [reason for adding]

**Dependency Updates:**
- [ ] No dependency updates
- [ ] Dependencies updated (listed in package.json)

## 📚 Documentation
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Component documentation updated
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] Migration guide created (if needed)

## 🎯 Deployment Notes
**Environment Variables:**
- [ ] No new environment variables
- [ ] New environment variables documented in .env.example

**Database Changes:**
- [ ] No database changes
- [ ] Database migrations included

**Configuration Changes:**
- [ ] No configuration changes
- [ ] Configuration changes documented

## 👀 Review Focus Areas
Please pay special attention to:
- [ ] Performance implications
- [ ] Security considerations
- [ ] Accessibility compliance
- [ ] Error handling
- [ ] Edge cases
- [ ] Mobile experience
- [ ] Browser compatibility

## 📝 Additional Notes
<!-- Any additional information, context, or considerations for reviewers -->

## 🚀 Post-Merge Tasks
- [ ] Update project documentation
- [ ] Notify stakeholders
- [ ] Monitor error rates
- [ ] Update related issues
- [ ] Schedule follow-up tasks

---

**Reviewer Guidelines:**
1. Check functionality against acceptance criteria
2. Verify code quality and style consistency
3. Test on multiple browsers/devices
4. Validate accessibility compliance
5. Review security implications
6. Assess performance impact
7. Ensure documentation is complete

**Merge Requirements:**
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] At least 2 approving reviews
- [ ] No unresolved conversations
- [ ] Branch is up to date with main
- [ ] All checklist items completed
